name: IDBI FD Ladder
description: Laddered fixed deposits across tenors for steady, guaranteed returns and liquidity.

name: IDBI Recurring Deposit
description: Fixed monthly savings that build a corpus with assured interest.

name: Nifty 50 Index Fund SIP
description: Low-cost passive SIP tracking the Nifty 50 for disciplined long-term wealth building.

name: Liquid Fund Sweep
description: Auto-sweep of idle balance into a liquid fund for better-than-savings returns with same-day access.

name: Short Duration Debt Fund
description: Debt fund holding short-maturity bonds; low volatility, suited to irregular cash flows.

name: AAA Corporate FD
description: Highest-rated corporate fixed deposit offering a premium over bank FD rates.

name: RBI Floating Rate Savings Bonds
description: Sovereign-backed floating-rate bonds; capital-safe with periodic interest payout.

name: Debt + Index Core Portfolio
description: A rule-based core allocation blending debt funds and an index fund for balanced growth.

name: G-Sec Ladder
description: Ladder of government securities for sovereign safety and predictable long-tenor income.

name: NRE Fixed Deposit
description: Rupee deposit for NRIs; interest tax-free in India and fully repatriable.

name: FCNR(B) Deposit
description: Foreign-currency deposit for NRIs with no exchange-rate risk on principal.

name: Senior Citizens Savings Scheme
description: Government scheme for 60+ investors with quarterly payout and Section 80C benefit.

name: IDBI Senior Citizen FD
description: Fixed deposit with an additional interest premium for senior citizens.

name: ELSS Tax-Saver Fund
description: Equity-linked savings scheme with a 3-year lock-in and Section 80C tax benefit.

name: Flexi-Cap Equity Fund
description: Actively managed equity fund investing across large, mid and small caps.

name: Balanced Advantage Fund
description: Dynamic equity-debt fund that shifts allocation with market valuations.

name: Equity Satellite Fund
description: A satellite equity allocation layered on a debt-index core for extra growth.

name: Managed Equity (PMS-lite)
description: Professionally managed concentrated equity portfolio for affluent investors.

name: RM-led Asset Allocation
description: Bespoke multi-asset allocation designed and rebalanced by a relationship manager.

name: Structured Market-Linked Note
description: Principal-protected note with returns linked to an equity index for HNI investors.

name: Alternative Investment Fund (Cat III)
description: SEBI-registered alternative fund pursuing long-short and derivative strategies.

name: Repatriable Index Fund
description: Index fund routed through NRE so gains stay repatriable for NRI investors.

name: NRI Equity Portfolio (PIS)
description: Direct Indian equity portfolio for NRIs under the Portfolio Investment Scheme.

name: Monthly Income Plan
description: Debt-oriented hybrid fund paying a monthly dividend for regular-income seekers.

name: Treasury Bill Ladder
description: Ladder of short-tenor sovereign Treasury Bills for HNI cash management with capital safety and staggered liquidity.

name: Multi-Asset PMS
description: Discretionary multi-asset portfolio management blending equity, debt and gold for HNI diversification.

name: Category II AIF - Structured Credit
description: Category II alternative investment fund deploying into structured credit opportunities for sophisticated HNI investors.

name: Flexi Micro Recurring Deposit
description: Flexible-installment recurring deposit built for irregular gig income; skip a month without penalty.
